items.title: TigerFS Mounts PostgreSQL Databases as a Filesystem for Developers and AI Agents
items.summaryShort: TigerFS Mounts PostgreSQL Databases as a Filesystem for Developers and AI Agents. TigerFS is a new experimental filesystem that mounts a database as a directory and stores files directly in PostgreSQL.

items.title: As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help
items.summaryShort: As people look for ways to make new friends, here are the apps promising to help. We've compiled a list of friendship apps, from friend discovery platforms like BFF to event-focused ones like Timeleft.
